subcodes.first_line: O thou honorable martyr and the pioneer of the Cause of God! The letter which you had written on the 19th of December 1918
subcodes.subjects: @teachings as spirit of the age, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @praise of Western values; culture, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prophecy and fulfillment
